opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch looks brand new for $52 — pet hair gone in 60 seconds
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, stained, pet-hair-covered sofa that guests see the moment they walk in
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, modern sofa that looks like a $1,200 replacement — took under a minute
opportunities.why_now: Spring refresh + shedding season overlap drives peak pet-hair frustration searches in May, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes every conversion high-value.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead patio becomes an outdoor living room for $329
opportunities.before_state: Empty, neglected concrete patio with a sad folding chair and cracked flowerpot
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor lounge with cushioned sectional, side table, and throw pillows — ready to entertain
opportunities.why_now: Late May is the single hottest week of the year for patio furniture purchases as Memorial Day weekend shopping peaks — Best Choice Products' 15% commission on a $329 ticket is a strong payout.

opportunities.specific_product: Clear stackable pantry bins with labels set (12-piece)
opportunities.transformation_hook: $38 turns a chaotic pantry into a Pinterest kitchen in one afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing pantry shelves with fallen cereal boxes, mystery cans, and zero system
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded, labeled, fully visible pantry where every item has a home and nothing expires forgotten
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning momentum is still peak in late May and pantry organization Reels consistently hit 500K+ views due to the satisfying label-and-sort reveal format.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow with adjustable fill
opportunities.transformation_hook: $79 pillow ended 3 years of waking up with neck pain
opportunities.before_state: Flat, misshapen pillow causing shoulder and neck stiffness every single morning
opportunities.after_state: Deep, aligned sleep with zero neck pain — same person, completely different mornings
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content is surging in 2026 and Eli & Elm's 20% commission on a $79 price point delivers strong ROI; the pain-to-relief arc is one of the most shareable Reel structures.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia 25-piece silicone kitchen utensil set with holder
opportunities.transformation_hook: Replace every mismatched kitchen tool for $34 — counter goes from chaos to clean
opportunities.before_state: Drawer crammed with mismatched, stained, melted spatulas and random tools with no home
opportunities.after_state: Matching silicone set in a countertop holder — functional, beautiful, and completely organized
opportunities.why_now: Kitchen upgrade searches spike in May as people cook more at home pre-summer and Syruvia's 20% commission makes this low-ticket item punch well above its price.
